title: Handoff
description: Platform-level schema for a handoff (explicit control transfer). See docs/subagent-schemas.md for full semantics, invariants, and customization boundaries.

handoff_id.description: Unique identifier for the handoff. Must start with 'handoff-'.

from_role.description: The role currently holding control, e.g. 'main-ai', 'worker-ai', 'human-reviewer'.

authoritative_refs.description: Authoritative documents the receiving role must re-read before proceeding.

carried_constraints.description: Constraints that must be carried over and respected by the receiving role.

open_items.description: Unresolved items transferred with this handoff.

current_gate_state.description: Current review state machine state at handoff time. Must align with review-state-machine.md.

intake_requirements.description: Minimum verification actions the receiving role must perform before taking over.
